cleavage agent: digestion buffer containing Sequencing grade Trypsin
fractionation method: subjected to SDS-PAGE and Western Blotting
fragmentation method: HCD spectra resolution was set to 35000
instrument: injected on a quadrupole Orbitrap Q-Exactive mass spectrometer
labeling: peptides were desalted as described by, dried in a Speed-Vac and re-suspended in 10 μl of solvent A (2% ACN, 0.1% formic acid).
